title: Medical Records Technician
description: AstraZeneca is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on oncology, cardiovascular, and respiratory treatments. You'll maintain critical medical records for our research and clinical operations.
responsibilities: Manage patient medical records ensuring accuracy and compliance
Code medical procedures and diagnoses for billing and research
Maintain confidentiality and enforce HIPAA protocols
Prepare records for internal audits and external reviews
Respond to records requests from patients and providers
Update systems with clinical information from various sources

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Health Information Technology or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of medical records or health information management experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
